intended_use: The COMPLETE CONTROL System Gen2 is to be used exclusively for external prosthetic fittings of the upper limbs.
intended_use_full: The COMPLETE CONTROL System Gen2 is to be used exclusively for external prosthetic fittings of the upper limbs.
other_metrics: Internal validation testing results reported as pass/fail for: Cabling Connection Test, Power On and Boot Test, Bluetooth Connectivity and Profile Test, Inputs Test, Outputs Test, Calibration and Pattern Recognition Test, and File Save Test (all passed).
